mapper.insert: insert into event_templates ( event_template_id, company_id, name, content, description, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{eventTemplateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: select event_template_id, company_id, name, content, description, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at from event_templates where company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by created_at desc
